name: Moe Kaiketsu
description: Anime image shown inline above Codeforces problem statements, sourced from your choice of provider (waifu.im, Safebooru, Danbooru, Yande.re) with fully free-text, user-editable tags and optional per-provider API keys to reduce rate limiting. Safe-rated content only, one image per problem cached so it won't change on reload, with a small message shown instead of the image if it's ever unavailable.
